title: staehelina conyzoides
intro: Staehelina conyzoides, also known as the False Artichoke, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Staehelina conyzoides include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
